name: Cypher Tempre Enforcement
description: Native OpenClaw lifecycle plugin that routes turns through the Cypher Tempre Timechain enforcement spine.

skillRoot.description: Path to the installed cypher-tempre-self-model skill folder. Defaults to CT_SKILL_DIR or ~/.openclaw/workspace/skills/cypher-tempre-self-model.

chainRoot.description: Optional separate Timechain root. Defaults to CT_ENFORCE_ROOT or skillRoot.

pythonBin.description: Python executable used to run enforce.py and dormancy.py.

timeoutMs.description: Per-command timeout for local Python enforcement calls.

maxFinalizeAttempts.description: Maximum extra model passes requested by before_agent_finalize for one unsealed turn.

injectReminder.description: Append a short Timechain loop reminder to the model prompt.
